summary: Factory Return Source-First Selection feature tested successfully. All 13 features verified: (1) Source is primary selection with two card-style buttons, (2) Warehouse source shows only Expired/Damaged reasons, (3) Customer source shows Empty/Reusable/Expired/Damaged reasons, (4) Warehouse source shows amber settlement warning banner, (5) Customer source shows blue 'no additional settlement' info banner, (6) Switching sources changes reason dropdown and banner, (7) Warehouse source creates return with requires_settlement=true, (8) Customer source creates return with requires_settlement=false, (9) Backend rejects empty_reusable with warehouse source (400 error), (10) Factory returns table shows Source column with Warehouse/Customer badges, (11) Factory returns table shows Settlement column with Adjustable/Tracking only badges, (12) Confirm factory return deducts stock from warehouse, (13) Settlement query filters by requires_settlement/source=warehouse.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_factory_returns_source.py - New test file for source-first selection
seed_data_creation: Factory returns created during testing with both warehouse and customer_return sources
context_for_next_testing_agent: Factory Return dialog now has source-first selection: (1) Warehouse Stock - expired/damaged only, requires_settlement=true, amber warning banner, (2) Customer Return - empty_reusable/expired/damaged, requires_settlement=false, blue info banner. Factory returns table shows Source column (Warehouse/Customer badges) and Settlement column (Adjustable/Tracking only badges). Settlement query uses $or: [{requires_settlement: true}, {source: 'warehouse'}] to handle both old and new records.

verified: Two card-style buttons: Warehouse Stock, Customer Return
Warehouse selected by default with amber border
Customer Return shows blue border when selected
Shows only 'Expired Stock' and 'Damaged Stock' options
Does NOT show 'Empty / Reusable Bottles' option
Shows 'Empty / Reusable Bottles' as first option
Also shows 'Expired Stock' and 'Damaged Stock' options
Warehouse: Amber banner - 'This return will be adjusted in settlement'
Customer: Blue banner - 'No additional settlement — customer returns are already accounted for via credit notes'

Backend_Reason_Validation.verified: Backend returns 400 error when empty_reusable reason is used with warehouse source

verified: Source column with Warehouse (amber) and Customer (blue) badges
Settlement column with Adjustable and Tracking only badges

Stock_Deduction_On_Confirm.verified: Confirming factory return deducts stock from distributor warehouse

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/factory-returns - List with source and requires_settlement fields
